OPERATIONAL_FLOWS_SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION: Configure the closing flow for each Caixa (inbox): the result reasons available when resolving a conversation as won or lost, and whether a reason is required.

API.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not delete the closing flow

CONFIRM.TITLE: Delete {flowName}?
CONFIRM.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete this closing flow? Caixas using it will fall back to no flow.

FORM.SUBTITLE: Define the reasons agents can pick when resolving a conversation.

REQUIRE_REASON.LABEL: Require a reason
REQUIRE_REASON.HELP: Agents must pick a reason to resolve a conversation as won or lost.

META.LABEL: Send conversions to Meta
META.HELP: Master switch for this flow. When on, each state below can fire a Meta event.

CATEGORY.LABEL: Category
CATEGORY.HELP: Reporting dimension. Sales closings feed the sales funnel; support closings are kept separate and never count as conversions.

STATES.LABEL: Resolution states (closing buttons)
STATES.REQUIRES_REASON: Require a reason for this state

USED_BY.TITLE: This flow is used by:
USED_BY.EMPTY: No rule uses this flow yet.

FORM.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not save the closing flow

REQUIREMENTS.LABEL: Required attributes to close
REQUIREMENTS.HELP: Attributes the agent must fill before resolving as one of these states.

ASSIGNMENT_RULES.DESCRIPTION: Decides which flow applies to each conversation — primarily by team, and by exception per channel (Caixa) or role. The most specific matching rule wins.
ASSIGNMENT_RULES.EMPTY: No rules yet. Add at least one (e.g. per team) so conversations get a flow. A conversation that matches no rule simply uses no flow.
ASSIGNMENT_RULES.PRIORITY_HELP: Lower numbers are evaluated first. The first rule that matches decides the flow.

FORM.CONDITIONS_INTRO: The team usually decides the flow. Restrict by channel or use an advanced exception only when needed.
FORM.ROLE_CHECKBOX: Differentiate by the role of whoever closes the conversation
FORM.ROLE_EXPLANATION: Used only when coordinators or managers follow different processes.

HUMAN.ROLE: is closed by someone with the role "{name}"

ASSIGNMENT_RULES.SAVE_ERROR: Could not save the assignment rule
ASSIGNMENT_RULES.SPECIFICITY_HELP: The most specific matching rule (the one with more conditions) wins. With no conditions, it applies to any conversation.
